title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Pro-HD-24
description: Ubiquiti USW-Pro-HD-24 is a 24-port PoE switch with L3 functionality. The switch features 22x 2.5Gb and 2x 10Gb ports . Additionally, the switch includes 4x SFP+ ports and supports redundant power via the Ubiquiti UniFi SmartPower Redundant Power System (USP-RPS) 1.3" touch display 22x 2.5G + 2x 10G Ethernet with POE++ support 4x SFP+ ports Redundant power option (USP-RPS) Etherlighting technology for Ethernet and SFP ports L3 features: DHCP/DHCP relay, Inter-VLAN routing, Static routing, Network isolation with ACLs Managed via UniFi Network application v8.6.9 or later Switch 230V power cable 19" rack mount brackets (4) Cage nuts (4) 10#-32 screws (8) M4 screws (4) Rubber adhesive feet
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/5/2.5/1Gbps + (22) 2.5/1Gbps, 100/10Mbps Optical interfaces (4) 1G/10Gbps Power Power type Mains power (230V) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 50 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 285 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 230 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 171
